mapper.select: select id as id, cartId as cartId, userId as userId, productId as productId, skuId as skuId, quantity as quantity, checked as checked, price as price, createTime as createTime, updateTime as updateTime, isDelete as isDelete from cart_item where cartId = #{cartId} and skuId = #{skuId} limit 1
mapper.update: update cart_item set productId = #{productId}, userId = #{userId}, quantity = #{quantity}, checked = #{checked}, price = #{price}, isDelete = 0 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ci.id as id, ci.cartId as cartId, ci.productId as productId, ci.skuId as skuId, p.name as productName, p.title as productTitle, ps.skuName as skuName, coalesce(nullif(ps.image, ''), ( select pi.url from product_images pi where pi.productId = p.id order by pi.isMain desc, pi.sortOrder asc, pi.createTime asc limit 1 )) as image, ci.price as price, ci.quantity as quantity, ci.checked as checked, ps.stock as stock from cart_item ci inner join product p on p.id = ci.productId inner join product_skus ps on ps.id = ci.skuId where ci.userId = #{userId} and ci.isDelete = 0 and p.isDelete = 0 and p.status = 1 order by ci.updateTime desc, ci.id desc
